library_preparation_preflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, or environment/system property is required; the artifact brings its Java dependencies transitively, and the current failure is caused by Maven SCM 2.2.1 API changes in the existing tests rather than missing setup.
risks: Tests that execute real Git commands assume `git` is available on `PATH`; this is normally true on the Gradle/CI runners, but minimal local environments could fail without it.
If tests perform real commits or signed tags, they must configure a temporary repository-local Git identity and avoid GPG signing; command-construction or parser tests do not need this.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8354 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.scm:maven-scm-provider-gitexe:2.2.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015
